stemHtml: In a large jet aeroplane with powered controls when the pilot is operating the aircraft Control Wheel Steering mode, the flight controls are operated…

options.a: by the pilot through fully-powered manual controls.
options.b: under the control of the pilot using the heading bug and altitude selector.
options.c: by the pilot through the autopilot computer and actuators.
options.d: under control of the FMS through the autopilot.
